name: Betterment, LLC.
message: Size: 1.6 GB (compressed) | Records: 20M Records | Updated: 23 Jan 2026 | Note: Betterment better(get some)help | Betterment refused our generous offers as low as $0.95 per active customer record stolen. If you are a Betterment customer, remember that they value your privacy and peace of mind lower than the price of a roll of toilet paper.
